{{Quote|Deliver more than you promise. The best way to be always certain of this is to deliver much, even when you promise nothing.|Tho-Mes Drei|<ref name="Power of the Jedi Sourcebook">''[[Power of the Jedi Sourcebook]]''</ref>}}
'''Tho-Mes Drei''' was a male [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served as an instructor at the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]], known for his lectures on making and keeping promises.
